summary: The FY26 figure for this indicator in the dataset is a partial-year, year-to-date total rather than a full fiscal year. OATH's own preliminary Fiscal 2026 report shows appeals decisions running about 24 percent behind the same period a year earlier through the first four months of the fiscal year, so the full-year total will be higher than this partial figure suggests, though still likely below FY24's level.

sources.label: OATH, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report
